riskRows.detail: Treating PR 825 as green would legitimize packet-tail replay as payload and break canonical scope control.
Any further write must bind to root head 6f08f94d... or stop again under delivery enforcement.
Sync packet commits 821 through 825 must remain governance bindings only unless owner explicitly expands scope.

rollbackRows.action: Do not open any main promotion contour and preserve C03 as blocked.
rollbackRows.trigger: No corrected replay-readiness contour exists on the new binding base.

rollbackRows.action: Reject the contour and restore canonical B2C chain only as the allowed future payload scope.
rollbackRows.trigger: Any new contour proposes packet-only sync tail replay as payload.
